title: Mr.Spd's_ Better Totem Sound
description: "Replace the annoying vanilla totem sound with a crisp, chiming, high-fidelity pop designed for PVP, Crystal PVP, and survival."
body:
This Resourcepack aims to better the totem pop sound in Minecraft by adding an easy-on-the-ear chime sound which still fits the totem vibe... Here's the Sample (NOTE: Versions 1.21.9 and below may be marked as incompatible or broken by Minecraft, but they still work.) 

---

# 🔊 Recommended Setup
This pack is a direct visual continuation of my **[The Void Totem of Undying](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/the-void-totem-of-undying)** pack. They are designed to work together as a matching set for the ultimate clean audio and visual setup.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ycBvWfW_OMw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

# 🖼️ Icon & Visual Asset Credit
> **NOTE:** The Netherite Totem with Red Eyes visual texture shown in my project icon and preview screenshots belongs entirely to **Choko**. I used their texture for presentation purposes and want to ensure they get full credit for their awesome artwork! 🙌

* **Choko's Pack:** **[Netherite Totem [Red Eyes]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/netherite-totem-red-eyes)** 🔗
* **Creator:** **[Choko](https://modrinth.com/user/Choko)** 👤

Go check out their original resource pack and drop it a heart! ❤️
